Domain: Domain 3: Earth and Space Sciences. Subdomain 3.1: The Universe and the Solar System
Learning Outcome: Learning Outcome 6.5.3.1.1: Describing the changes in the appearance of the moon during its revolution around the Earth and identifying the phenomena associated with that.

Domain: Domain 3: Earth and Space Sciences. Subdomain 3.1: The Universe and the Solar System
Learning Outcome: Learning Outcome 6.5.3.1.2: Explaining the phenomena related to the movement of the earth, the moon and the sun and the resulting changes.

Domain: Domain 3: Earth and Space Sciences. Subdomain 3.1: The Universe and the Solar System
Learning Outcome: Learning Outcome 6.5.3.1.3: Concluding the effect of gravity on the movement of the solar system, galaxies and associated phenomena.

Domain: Domain 3: Earth and Space Sciences. Subdomain 3.1: The Universe and the Solar System
Learning Outcome: Learning Outcome 6.5.3.1.4 Determining the characteristics of the solar system, and comparing the solar system to the galaxy and the universe.

Domain: Domain 1: Life Sciences. Subdomain 1.1: Structure and Function in Living Organisms
Learning Outcome: 6.5.1.1.1 Describing the cell structures and linking them to their vital functions.

Domain: Domain 1: Life Sciences. Subdomain 1.1: Structure and Function in Living Organisms
Learning Outcome: 6.5.1.1.3 Identifying the main body systems and their specialized organs and linking them to their functions that supports growth and survival of living organisms (plants and animals).

Domain: Domain 1: Life Sciences. Subdomain 1.1: Structure and Function in Living Organisms
Learning Outcome: 6.5.1.1.2 Identifying the major structural and functional differences between animal and plant cells.

Domain: Domain 1: Life Sciences. Subdomain 1.1: Structure and Function in Living Organisms
Learning Outcome: 6.5.1.1.4 Describing the different patterns in the life cycles of animals and plants and the changes accompanying them, and comparing them.

Domain: Domain 1: Life Sciences. Subdomain 1.2: Organization and Diversity of Living Organisms
Learning Outcome: 6.5.1.2.1 Classifying living organisms into groups based on common phenotypic traits.

Domain: Domain 1: Life Sciences. Subdomain 1.3: Ecosystems and Their Interactions
Learning Outcome: 6.5.1.3.4 Describing the effect of environmental changes on plants and animals that live in specific environments. Inferring how behavioral and structural adaptations can help plants and animals survive in their habitats

Domain: Domain 1: Life Sciences. Subdomain 1.3: Ecosystems and Their Interactions
Learning Outcome: 6.5.1.3.1 Representing biological communities and identifying types of population that lives in it, describing the interrelationships among them, and their interaction with the abiotic components, and the impact of biological communities changes on their survival and sustainability.

Domain: Domain 1: Life Sciences. Subdomain 1.3: Ecosystems and Their Interactions
Learning Outcome: 6.5.1.3.2 Describing the components of the ecosystem and explaining the impact of the availability of different resources in ecosystems on the survival and sustainability of living organisms, and proposing solutions to problems that affect the stability of the ecosystem.

Domain: Domain 1: Life Sciences. Subdomain 1.3: Ecosystems and Their Interactions
Learning Outcome: 6.5.1.3.3 Representing the relationships between living organisms in which matter is circulated in the ecosystem, and identifying the relationship between plants and energy obtained from the sun to produce food.

Domain: Domain 1: Life Sciences. Subdomain 1.3: Ecosystems and Their Interactions
Learning Outcome: 6.5.1.3.5 Inferring the effects of human activity on environmental habitats and populations, and predicting its impact, proposing solutions to protect them.

Domain: Domain 1: Life Sciences. Subdomain 1.4: Genetics
Learning Outcome: 6.5.1.4.1 Identifying the inheritance of traits, explaining the variation in them, tracing their transmission from one generation to the next, distinguishing their types (dominant and recessive), and clarifying the impact of the environment on them.

Domain: Domain 2: Physical Sciences. Subdomain 2.1: Matter and its Interactions
Learning Outcome: 6.5.2.1.1 Exploring the physical properties of matter, distinguishing the molecular structure of its different states, and explaining the change of matter states due to heat.

Domain: Domain 2: Physical Sciences. Subdomain 2.1: Matter and its Interactions
Learning Outcome: 6.5.2.1.2 Understanding the chemical changes of matter, clarifying the concepts and methods related to it, and comparing mass of different matters when their properties change based on the law of conservation of mass.

Domain: Domain 2: Physical Sciences. Subdomain 2.1: Matter and its Interactions
Learning Outcome: 6.5.2.1.3 Understanding chemical reactions, the indicators of their occurrence, types, and factors affecting their reaction rate.

Domain: Domain 2: Physical Sciences. Subdomain 2.1: Matter and its Interactions
Learning Outcome: 6.5.2.1.4 Exploring the chemical properties of materials, and distinguishing between the interactions of acids and bases, their chemical properties, and their uses.

Domain: Domain 2: Physical Sciences. Subdomain 2.2: Motion and Forces
Learning Outcome: 6.5.2.2.1 Describing the effect of force on objects, and distinguishing types of forces

Domain: Domain 2: Physical Sciences. Subdomain 2.2: Motion and Forces
Learning Outcome: 6.5.2.2.3 Explaining the factors affecting types of forces, such as gravitational force, friction, and magnetism.

Domain: Domain 2: Physical Sciences. Subdomain 2.2: Motion and Forces
Learning Outcome: 6.5.2.2.2 Understanding Newton’s three laws of motion and using them to explain body motion.

Domain: Domain 2: Physical Sciences. Subdomain 2.3: Energy
Learning Outcome: 6.5.2.3.1 Understanding the concept of energy and work, distinguishing between them, and giving real life examples.

Domain: Domain 2: Physical Sciences. Subdomain 2.3: Energy
Learning Outcome: 6.5.2.3.2 Understanding the principle of energy conservation during its transformations and apply it in daily life.

Domain: Domain 2: Physical Sciences. Subdomain 2.4: Waves and Vibrations
Learning Outcome: 6.5.2.4.2 Understanding the concepts of reflection and refraction of light, transmission of sound, and explaining their role in interaction and communication in the surrounding environment.

Domain: Domain 2: Physical Sciences. Subdomain 2.4: Waves and Vibrations
Learning Outcome: 6.5.2.4.1 Describing waves, distinguishing between their properties theoretically and graphically, and predicting their movement.

Domain: Domain 2: Physical Sciences. Subdomain 2.5: Electromagnetism
Learning Outcome: 6.5.2.5.1 Understanding the concept of electric charge, explaining the attraction and repulsion of charged bodies, and comparing electrical circuits connected in series and in parallel.Understanding the concept of electric charge, explaining the attraction and repulsion of charged bodies, and comparing electrical circuits connected in series and in parallel.

Domain: Domain 2: Physical Sciences. Subdomain 2.5: Electromagnetism
Learning Outcome: 6.5.2.5.2 Understanding the properties of magnets and their uses in daily life.

Domain: Domain 3: Earth and Space Sciences. Subdomain 3.2: The Earth System
Learning Outcome: 6.5.3.2.2 Deducing the relationship of the Earth’s spheres to each other and predicting the interactions, and changes that occur between them and the geological effects resulting from them.

Domain: Domain 3: Earth and Space Sciences. Subdomain 3.2: The Earth System
Learning Outcome: 6.5.3.2.1 Classifying the layers of the atmosphere and identifying their components, characteristics, changes, its effects on the environment and their benefits to humans.

Domain: Domain 3: Earth and Space Sciences. Subdomain 3.2: The Earth System
Learning Outcome: 6.5.3.2.3 Describing the factors and processes that affected the Earth’s surface which changed some of its features.

Domain: Domain 3: Earth and Space Sciences. Subdomain 3.2: The Earth System
Learning Outcome: 6.5.3.2.4 Describing the types of rocks and their relationship to minerals and distinguishing their characteristics and uses.

Domain: Domain 3: Earth and Space Sciences. Subdomain 3.2: The Earth System
Learning Outcome: 6.5.3.2.5 Determining the causes and effects of earthquakes and volcanoes and identifying the sites most vulnerable to earthquakes and volcanoes.
